---
title: "Dr. Roman Kessler"
from: markdown+emoji
---

Cognitive Neuroscientist & Data Scientist

Currently working at the Max Planck Institute for Human Cognitive and Brain Sciences, Leipzig, Germany. 

Leipzig / Frankfurt a.M. :green_heart:

[Email me](mailto:rkesslerx@gmail.com)

<!---
your comment goes here
![](cat_box.gif)
-->



## Links

Planing on holidays in the picturesque black forest?

<style>
.image-link img {
    width: 300px;  /* Adjust the width as needed */
    height: auto;  /* This will automatically adjust the height proportionally */
}
</style>

<a href="https://ferienparadies-maierbauernhof.jimdosite.com" class="image-link"><img src="holidays.jpg" alt="holidays"></a>

For relaxing: 

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ydYDqZQpim8 width="600" height="400" >}}
